title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #6, Magellan, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #10 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #6, Magellan, Unknown person #14, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The sea still holds unseen dreams!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The world grows restless at this news.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: The Marines have won!!! Thank God!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: NGAHAHaha... hmmm!? This island is... what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Burn this image into your eyes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm the great pirate brown- beard!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #6, Magellan, Unknown person #14, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: rising conflict.
